testcase.name: test_set_template_as_default

failure.message: AssertionError: Template should be set as default assert None == True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfae73a0c28c0>('is_default') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfae73a0c28c0> = {'message': 'Template set as default', 'success': True}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partners_templates.py:338: in test_set_template_as_default assert data.get("is_default") == True, "Template should be set as default" E AssertionError: Template should be set as default E assert None == True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfae73a0c28c0>('is_default') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfae73a0c28c0> = {'message': 'Template set as default', 'success': True}.get

testcase.name: test_delete_template
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partners_templates.py:347: in test_delete_template assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 400: {"detail":"Cannot delete the default template"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
